meta.title: DotKu Studio — AI-Powered Business Solutions
meta.description: DotKu Studio — a San Francisco Bay Area studio delivering production AI, web and mobile solutions for enterprises across 9 industries. 865+ open-source repos, 30+ partner companies, 13+ years of experience.

about.pageDescription: DotKu Studio is a San Francisco Bay Area studio delivering AI-powered business solutions for enterprises across 9 industries.
about.heading: A studio built for delivery
about.sub: We're a compact, senior team that ships production software. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we work with enterprises worldwide — from Silicon Valley startups to established companies in Asia and North America.
about.missionBody: Real products beat decks. Open-source beats black boxes. Long-term partnerships beat billable hours. We ship, we share what we learn, and we show up for clients across multiple release cycles.

hero.body: DotKu Studio is a San Francisco Bay Area studio that builds production-grade AI, web and mobile products for enterprises across media, tech, medical, supply chain and finance. We ship real products — and open-source what we learn along the way.

services.heading: Custom solutions, shipped to production
services.sub: From AI integrations to multilingual commerce platforms, we partner with companies to deliver software that actually ships.

ai.title: AI Integration & Custom LLMs
ai.desc: Production AI features, RAG pipelines, agent systems and custom model fine-tuning for enterprise use cases.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Software Development
enterprise.desc: End-to-end product delivery: Next.js / React web apps, mobile, internal tools, CRM and backend platforms.

global.title: Multilingual Portals & E-commerce
global.desc: Global-ready business portals with URL-based i18n, SEO-optimized content, and integrated payments.

advisory.title: Technical Advisory & Due Diligence
advisory.desc: 1:1 consulting, architectural reviews, M&A technical due diligence and hiring support.

vendors.heading: Built on proven infrastructure
vendors.sub: We integrate with industry-leading cloud, AI and payment providers — so your product runs on platforms your team already trusts.

partners.heading: Trusted across 9 industries
partners.sub: Long-term engagements — from Bay Area startups to established enterprises in China, Canada and the U.S.

projects.heading: Open-source footprint by GICS sector
projects.subBefore: 865+ public repositories (forks marked 🔀) classified with the
projects.subAfter: — the taxonomy MSCI and S&P use for global equity markets. Use it as a map of where we've built.

it.name: Information Technology
it.desc: Software, IT services, hardware and semiconductors. AI, LLM tools, Next.js apps, DevOps.

cd.name: Consumer Discretionary
cd.desc: Retail, apparel, restaurants, travel, education and consumer services.

ind.name: Industrials
ind.desc: Capital goods, transportation & logistics, commercial and professional services.

com.name: Communication Services
com.desc: Media, entertainment, telecom, interactive media and social platforms.

fin.name: Financials
fin.desc: Fintech, crypto, payments, trading and accounting tools.

hc.name: Health Care
hc.desc: Medical devices, telehealth, lab testing, clinics and wellness apps.

en.name: Energy
en.desc: Solar, portable power (Carku) and energy-infrastructure tooling.

re.name: Real Estate
re.desc: SF Bay Area appraisal & property tools.

featured.heading: Case studies & featured projects
featured.sub: A selection of the products we've shipped with partners — each one is open-source so you can inspect the craft.

projects.video2text: Extract speech and visual content from videos into text — used in production.
projects.sienovo: International business portal built with Next.js and MDX.
projects.crm: A lightweight CRM focused on business development and referrals.
projects.hippa: HIPAA-considerate chat demo for medical use cases.
projects.mcn: Multi-Channel Network tooling for creators in the Bay Area.
projects.search: Next.js 15 + TypeScript search aggregator across multiple platforms.

caseStudy.pageDescription: Case studies from DotKu Studio — production AI, web and mobile products shipped with partners across 9 industries.
caseStudy.heading: Work we've shipped with partners
caseStudy.sub: Selected production projects — each one open-source so you can inspect the craft, the tech stack and the outcome.

team.heading: Meet the team
team.sub: A tight-knit team that spans engineering, product delivery and global sales.

contact.heading: Let's discuss your project
contact.body: Working on a product idea, looking for a delivery partner, or want to talk about AI in your industry? We'd love to hear from you.

footer.parent: DotKu Studio is the technology R&D division of JY Tech LLC.
